## Summary

Briefly describe what this pull request changes.

## Why

What problem does this solve, or what workflow does it improve?

## Scope

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs only
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## What To Check

- affected area(s):
  - [ ] Texture Workflow
  - [ ] Replace Assistant
  - [ ] Archive Browser
  - [ ] Research
  - [ ] Text Search
  - [ ] Settings

- verification:
  - [ ] I tested the changed workflow locally
  - [ ] I updated docs/help text if user-facing behavior changed
  - [ ] I updated the changelog if this should be called out in release notes

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know about limitations, follow-up work, or risk areas.
